account_profile.purpose: scan-engine training corpus — single composite account
account_profile.currency_convention: All amounts posted in the account's native USD; foreign-currency transactions converted to USD with original currency/amount/rate noted inline in the descriptor.
account_profile.variance_notes: Run seed 2522887: Nov 2025–May 2026 window (captures Feb 28, New Year, Valentine's, Black Friday, Boxing Day), GUSTO + hourly payroll, rural-US/Atlantic-Prairie-Canada flavor, Cash App + Interac P2P, crypto-gig income, fraud emphasis on spoofing + account-takeover geo jumps.
